area.label: Land Area
area.source: Wikipedia — List of countries by area
area.tooltip: Total land area in square kilometres, excluding inland water. Source: Wikipedia — List of countries by area, 2023.

capital_distance.label: Distance from Equator
capital_distance.source: Wikipedia — List of countries by latitude
capital_distance.tooltip: Distance of the capital city from the equator in kilometres. Source: Wikipedia — List of countries by latitude, 2023.

elevation.label: Highest Elevation
elevation.source: Wikipedia — List of countries by highest point
elevation.tooltip: Altitude of the highest point in the country in metres above sea level. Source: Wikipedia — List of countries by highest point, 2023.

life_expectancy.label: Life Expectancy
life_expectancy.tooltip: Average life expectancy at birth in years. Source: WHO, 2022.

alcohol_per_capita.label: Alcohol Consumption
alcohol_per_capita.tooltip: Total alcohol consumption per person per year in litres of pure alcohol. Source: WHO, 2019.

annual_rainfall.label: Annual Rainfall
annual_rainfall.source: Wikipedia — List of countries by average annual precipitation
annual_rainfall.tooltip: Mean annual precipitation in millimetres per year. Source: Wikipedia — List of countries by average annual precipitation, 2023.

co2_per_capita.label: CO₂ per Capita
co2_per_capita.tooltip: CO₂ emissions per capita in tonnes per year. Source: Global Carbon Project, 2022.

coastline.label: Coastline Length
coastline.tooltip: Total coastline length in kilometres (0 for landlocked countries). Source: CIA World Factbook, 2023.

forest_coverage.label: Forest Coverage
forest_coverage.tooltip: Percentage of land area covered by forest. Source: World Bank, 2021.

gdp.label: GDP (Total)
gdp.tooltip: Gross domestic product at current prices in millions of US dollars. Source: World Bank, 2023.

gdp_per_capita.label: GDP per Capita
gdp_per_capita.tooltip: Gross domestic product divided by population in US dollars. Source: World Bank, 2023.

hdi.label: Human Development Index
hdi.tooltip: UNDP Human Development Index score (0 = lowest, 1 = highest). Source: UNDP, 2022.

internet_speed.label: Internet Speed
internet_speed.tooltip: Median fixed broadband download speed in megabits per second. Source: Ookla Speedtest Global Index, 2023.

obesity_rate.label: Obesity Rate
obesity_rate.tooltip: Percentage of adults classified as obese (BMI ≥ 30). Source: WHO, 2022.

olympic_medals.label: Olympic Medals (All-Time)
olympic_medals.source: Wikipedia — All-time Olympic Games medal table
olympic_medals.tooltip: Total Olympic medals won across all Summer and Winter Games. Source: Wikipedia — All-time Olympic Games medal table, 2024.

passport_power.label: Passport Power
passport_power.tooltip: Number of countries accessible without a prior visa. Source: Henley Passport Index, 2024.

population.label: Population
population.source: Wikipedia — List of countries by population
population.tooltip: Total resident population. Source: Wikipedia — List of countries by population, 2024.
